name: Blueberry Funny Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Blueberries, rinsed and drained, fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine blueberries, half a cup of sugar, and all the lemon juice in a saucepan. Stir gently until the mixture is simmering and the sugar has dissolved. Allow it to cool to lukewarm while you prepare the cake batter.
2. Cream the butter and add one quarter cup of sugar. Mix thoroughly. Add the egg and mix well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Alternately add these with the milk to the egg mixture. Stir in the vanilla.
4. Gently fold the blueberry sauce into the batter. Pour it into an unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
